evidence: "I found this story hilarious, and the chemistry of the cast was perfect for my taste."
"The story of a retired cop out to get an extremely violent pedophile murderer pulled me in and kept me riveted through many scenes."
"The story still holds up as an original narrative (no one's tried to 'remake' it)"
"It's paced like a television movie-of-the-week, and there are long pauses throughout."
"I found it fast-paced and quirky with lots of zippy one-liners."
"The adventure takes off from this point and the story that unfolds is truly unforgettable."
"The color is vibrant and crisp and the audio transfer is superb - even on a home theater system."
"I don't know how they do it, but this Blu-Ray version of the movie is so clean, crisp, and clear - it's almost like I'm on the same set as the actors..."
"I love Jack Nicholson and saw this film as an undiscovered gem."
"I loved this movie since first seeing it in 1976, and since then its been released on both VHS and DVD."
"The opening credits with all the newspaper highlights backed by eerie music."
"The audio transfer is also very good."
"The story that unfolds is truly unforgettable."
"I was genuinely entertained with its flashes of original brilliance."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedies and dramas with fast pacing and high production quality. They appreciate engaging narratives and emotional resonance, often highlighting the sensory experiences of the films they enjoy.
